title: Non Stick Frying Pan All Stoves Compatible Cookware Omelette Pan Forged Aluminum Frying Pans Non Stick Induction pan Set (20CM)
features: 🍳 HIGH QUALITY – This Royal Cuisine non-stick frying pan is made of durable and non-toxic, forged aluminum body that conducts heat quickly and evenly with precise temperature control and no hot spots for consistent and professional performance.

🍳 COMPATABILITY- Royal Cuisine egg pan is suitable for cooking on electric hobs, gas hobs, induction hobs and hot plates, and fully dishwasher safe. The stylish, pots and pans have a sleek black durable non-stick coating which will complement any kitchen and is also scratch resistant, so your forged aluminum appears newer for longer.

🍳 SAFE- The non-stick frying pan has a soft grip handle that stays cool to the touch to ensure your comfort and safety while you are whipping up culinary delights. The handle also has a convenient hole for hanging or for holding grill pan during cooking.

🍳 NON-STICK COATING– The non-stick coating and forged induction bottom prevents your food from burning or sticking to the pan making means it easier to clean. You can have healthier dishes as you’re only requires little to no oil on the basis of the pan to assist easy release.

🍳 CARE INSTRUCTIONS AND MEASUREMENTS: This 20,24,28 CM frying pan can easily be placed in the dishwasher or rinsed and wiped clean with a damp cloth. Avoid using any harsh detergents or scrubbing utensils to prevent scratches or damage to the non-stick.
description: Product Description A Great Addition to Any Kitchen The Royal Cuisine Aluminium frying pan will surely impress you with versatility, being widely compatible with induction stoves, BBQ grills and ovens. Bake, saute, grill, broil, braise, sear your favorite foods and enjoy perfect results every time, surprising your loved ones with your cooking skills! Some of the amazing features of this product: Aluminium for optimum heat conductivity. Compatible with oven, grill, stove, camping fire; Perfect cooking results for traditional, delicious meals; Ergonomic and sturdy handles; Thoughtful housewarming present, birthday present for cooking enthusiasts, chefs and stud Excellent Choice Royal Cuisine aluminum nonstick induction cookware makes an excellent choice for a first-time kitchen—or for any home cook looking for reliable, easy-to-use pieces. Stay-cool Silicone covered handles help keep hands a safe distance from the heat and support comfortable lifting and carrying. A hole at the end of the long handle(s) allows for convenient hanging storage. About Royal Cuisine Royal Cuisine is one of the leaders in non-stick cookware offering a host of high quality and enhanced products designed to simplify everyday tasks in the kitchen. Royal Cuisine's approach is one that evokes ingenuity and pleasure, aimed at people who enjoy the experience of cooking together. The brand is recognized for the variety and originality of its offer. It has been supporting consumers for with ingenious products that deliver healthy, balanced cooking and better results. Non-stick coating and forged aluminium base Anti-Scratch Our non-stick cookware are designed with advanced technology in this industry, provides longer lasting non stick performance compares with traditional cookware. No harmful chemicals used in coating and producing The pan’s non-stick coating and forged aluminum base means it is easy to clean, requires little to no oil and ensures better food release. Looking to give a gift to a friend, loved one or colleague? This frying Pan is most suited for this purpose. Aluminium cookware Expert non-stick coating Suitable for Induction, Gas, Electric, Hot Plates Hybrid Stone Coating
